title: cymopterus terebinthinus var. foeniculaceus
intro: Cymopterus terebinthinus var. foeniculaceus, also known as Foeniculus-scented Cymopterus, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cymopterus terebinthinus var. foeniculaceus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
